productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girls Navy Blue Floral Print Dress
description: Composition Navy blue strap dress made of 100% cotton, has a bow detail on the chest, flaring pin tucks at the midriff and branding above the hem. Comes with a white short sleeved t-shirt inside. Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your little princess enjoy her play time in style with this pretty little dress from doodle. The print adds an touch of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. This frock will make your little one look like a miniature version of a princess &ndash just like the ones in the fairy tales you read to her. Pair it with sandals from Croc.
